display.purpose: Large branding glyphs, mega footer titles, display stats.

body.purpose: Standard content paragraphs, form inputs, button text.

label.purpose: JetBrains Mono metadata tags and status indicators.

shadows.name: bone
shadows.purpose: Ambient depth for elevated containers and dialog overlays.

shadows.name: coral
shadows.purpose: Tactile drop shadow for coral action triggers.

motion.name: standard-ease
motion.purpose: Default styling shifts and hovering feedback transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button used for key call-to-actions, limited to one per viewport.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; height: 40px; padding: 0 20px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; background-color: #ed6f5c; color: #ffffff; white-space: nowrap; user-select: none; transition: all 0.15s ease-in-out; box-shadow: 0 14px 26px -16px rgba(237, 111, 92, 0.6); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #f08e7c; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary actions that sit alongside primary buttons without visual competition.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; height: 40px; padding: 0 20px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(21, 20, 15, 0.2); background-color: transparent; color: #15140f; white-space: nowrap; user-select: none; transition: all 0.15s ease-in-out; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: rgba(21, 20, 15, 0.4); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Elevated Ivory Card
components.description: Content grouping container applying surface noise texture and structural shadows.
components.html:
Nova Sala

Insira seu apelido para começar a estimar.
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #f7f1de; border-radius: 18px; border: 1px solid rgba(21, 20, 15, 0.05); padding: 28px; position: relative; box-shadow: 0 30px 60px -30px rgba(21, 20, 15, 0.15); box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-card-header { margin-bottom: 20px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Inter Tight', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 24px; margin: 0; color: #15140f; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; color: #2a2620; } .ds-surface-noise::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; border-radius: 18px; background-image: radial-gradient(at 20% 30%, rgba(21, 20, 15, 0.025) 0px, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at 80% 70%, rgba(21, 20, 15, 0.025) 0px, transparent 50%); opacity: 0.07; z-index: 0; }

narrative.overview: Pointly's visual language is artisanal, restrained, and tactile. It treats the digital workspace like a physical gallery: structured around fine lines, clean margins, and an off-white warm paper canvas. Identity is driven by strategic typographic choices and a high-contrast ink hierarchy, rather than heavy background fills or elaborate UI frames. Every page features a fine SVG fractal noise filter to mimic the texture of heavy paper.
keyCharacteristics: Paper & Ink Foundation: The interface relies on warm paper tones and dark ink text, establishing immediate reading contrast.
Micro-textured Surfaces: All containers and full pages apply a subtle SVG turbulence noise in a radial gradient mask.
Restrained Jewelry: High-chroma color is strictly capped; primary coral is limited, and mustard yellow is reserved exclusively for highlights.

rules.name: The Single CTA Rule
rules.body: No more than one solid coral CTA may be visible within a single screen viewport. Secondary actions must use border outlines or ghost treatments.

rules.name: The Jewelry Scale Rule
rules.body: High-chroma highlights like Antique Gold must cover less than 1% of any screen surface. They are jewelry, not structural color.

rules.name: The No-Condensed Display Rule
rules.body: Letter spacing on display headings must never go below -0.04em. Anything tighter makes the glyphs collide, hurting legibility and character.

rules.name: The Playfair Highlight Rule
rules.body: The Playfair Display font is used exclusively in italics for the brand Ø glyph and numerical deck values. Never use it for standard headings or body copy.

rules.name: The Border-Plus-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Never combine a border heavier than 1px with a shadow wider than 8px. Elevated containers must use either a 1px border with ambient shadow, or a clean boundary line alone.

dos: Do apply the .surface-noise class to all primary page roots and cards to maintain a unified tactile texture.
Do use Playfair Display italic for all Fibonacci cards and the brand Ø mark.
Do ensure small labels and icons in coral use the accessible Coral Deep (#b8412f) to meet AA contrast standards.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right accent stripes on cards or lists.
Don't use gradient text or glassmorphism blurs.
Don't use standard sans-serif uppercase eyebrows on every section (use section rules .sec-rule instead).
Don't round cards or sections with border-radius larger than 18px (except for fully rounded buttons or tags).
